texto: You are eating the sea, that's it, only the sensation of a gulp of sea water has been wafted out of it by some sorcery, and you are on the verge of remembering you don't know what, mermaids or the sudden smell ofkelp on the ebb tide or a poem you read once, something connectedwith the flavor of life itself...
explicacao: Citação de Eleanor Clark sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You are eating the sea, that's it, only the sensation of a gulp of sea water has been wafted out …” articula reflexao, food, eating em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
